response.original_title: The Loved One: The Michael Hutchence Story
response.overview: A tribute to the life and musical legacy of Michael Hutchence, lead singer and songwriter for Australian rock band INXS. This intense and heart touching documentary reveals several aspects and circumstances surrounding his career, his fame and his tragic passing. Filled with interviews with family, friends, producers and musicians who worked and lived with Michael Hutchence, this film gives audiences a passionate and comprehensive look at the artist's career. A trajectory that took Hutchence to the bars of Sydney and clubs around the world to the excesses of fame, which he tried to balance with his family life, while creating unforgettable hits, always at the top of the charts. Michael Hutchence was considered one of the greatest contemporary rock artists of all time
response.title: The Loved One: The Michael Hutchence Story
